model: G63 AMG 4X4² EDITION STRONGER THAN TIME
prestazioni: AMG M177 4.0L V8 Biturbo (engine code: M177 DE40 AL) upgraded with a Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo kit featuring twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, billet compressor wheels, and 1.22 A/R turbine housings, supporting 850+ HP on 93 octane with a custom ECU flash via HP Tuners G63-specific calibration (retaining OEM torque vectoring and 4MATIC+ drivetrain logic).

Full Weistec Engineering G63-specific drivetrain reinforcement: 8-bolt billet differential covers (front/rear), upgraded 3.92:1 ratio ring & pinion sets with cryo-treated gears, and a Quaife ATB helical LSD for the transfer case to eliminate driveline wind-up under extreme boost.

Custom Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with 3.5" diameter quad outlets, bypass valves, and a secondary catalytic converter delete (replaced with GESI high-flow sports cats for emissions compliance in EU/US markets), paired with a Valvetronic-style electronic exhaust flap controller for on-demand backpressure tuning.
estetica: Rocket Bunny Pandem G63-specific widebody kit (Type 2) with carbon fiber fenders, extended rocker panels, and a 3-piece rear diffuser, increasing track width by 60mm front/80mm rear while maintaining OEM portal axle clearance for 4X4² functionality.

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression/rebound/height), custom valving for the G63’s portal axles, and reinforced top mounts to handle 37" BFGoodrich KM3 tires on HRE FF17 22x12" ET15 wheels (offset optimized for 4X4² wheel travel).

Full carbon fiber exterior overhaul: Vorsteiner G63-specific front lip, rear spoiler, and side skirts (painted in Mercedes Designo Graphite Grey Magno), paired with a custom carbon fiber hood featuring dual heat extractors and a functional NACA duct feeding the Weistec intercoolers.
